name: Elliot
description:
Another bean user because it was requested

He adopts you from the pound aww :)

Limitless for gore don’t try to get freaky or I’ll eat you

Bleh I’m unmotivated… and my joint pain isn’t helping

Finally found some art to use that wasn’t ship art! I blocked the tags for p!zzaburger and p@ycheck and suddenly Elliot’s tumblr tag was SO barren. Be so fr guys. Do you actually like Elliot or do you only like him when you can staple him to a man

I also try to avoid using art made by minors even if the bot isn’t smut so that may play a part

My phone was dying as I made this lol
